display.name: agent_name
display.description: The name of the Temporal agent being used

display.name: language
display.description: Language being used for making Temporal calls

display.name: llm_model
display.description: LLM Model name being used in Temporal

filter.expression: service.name in $service_name AND telemetry.sdk.language in $language AND openinference.span.kind = 'LLM' AND llm.model_name in $llm_model
service.name in $service_name AND telemetry.sdk.language in $language AND openinference.span.kind = 'LLM' AND llm.model_name in $llm_model
service.name in $service_name AND telemetry.sdk.language in $language AND openinference.span.kind = 'LLM' AND llm.model_name in $llm_model
service.name in $service_name AND telemetry.sdk.language in $language AND openinference.span.kind = 'LLM' AND llm.model_name in $llm_model
service.name in $service_name AND openinference.span.kind = 'LLM' and llm.model_name EXISTS
service.name in $service_name telemetry.sdk.language in $language graph.node.id EXISTS and openinference.span.kind = 'AGENT'
service.name IN $service_name AND openinference.span.kind = 'AGENT' AND graph.node.id NOT EXISTS
service.name in $service_name AND telemetry.sdk.language in $language AND openinference.span.kind = 'AGENT' AND graph.node.id NOT EXISTS
service.name in $service_name AND telemetry.sdk.language in $language AND openinference.span.kind = 'AGENT' AND graph.node.id IN $agent_name
service.name in $service_name AND telemetry.sdk.language in $language AND openinference.span.kind = 'LLM' AND llm.model_name in $llm_model
service.name IN $service_name graph.node.id in $agent_name AND openinference.span.kind = 'AGENT'
service.name in $service_name AND graph.node.id EXISTS AND openinference.span.kind = 'AGENT'
